commands.review_summary:
The branch cherry-picks the merged main Telegram ingress spool recovery onto release/2026.6.11, updating Telegram polling/spool code, the shared channel ingress queue, and focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +330, Tests +541. Total +871 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Durable Telegram ingress claims can block later same-lane updates, and the merged main PR includes Mantis Telegram proof; I did not run a fresh release-branch repro because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainer review/landing is the right next action because this is a protected release backport with known API and durable Telegram delivery-state tradeoffs, not a narrow repair job.

target.title: fix(telegram): recover stalled ingress spool claims
target.body:
Related: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/97118

## What Problem This Solves

Fixes an issue where Telegram channel updates could remain claimed in the ingress spool and stop draining on release/2026.6.11. When a handler ran long enough or a claim got stranded, messages could sit pending or claimed instead of being processed.

## Why This Change Was Made

This backports the merged main fix from https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/97118, including token-guarded ingress claim refresh, safer stale-claim recovery, Telegram drain lane blocking, retry backoff metadata, and regression coverage. The release branch needed small conflict-resolution wiring because its Telegram spool adapter and channel queue primitives were behind main.

## User Impact

Telegram users should see queued updates drain again instead of getting stuck in the OpenClaw ingress spool. Operators also get safer recovery for stale claims without stealing claims that an active handler has refreshed.

## Evidence

- Main fix landed on main as https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/b8e3de11608d12354b17cadd3703b3823b055a24.
- Backport branch head: 769a9938b3c008aa0d6ae34b08b8b0af3f027589.
- Focused tests: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/telegram/src/telegram-ingress-spool.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/polling-session.test.ts src/channels/message/ingress-queue.test.ts` passed, 94 tests.
- Format/lint: `oxfmt --check` on touched files passed; `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs` on touched files passed.
- Autoreview: `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/release/2026.6.11` clean, no accepted/actionable findings.
- Testbox-through-Crabbox: `tbx_01kw7mnx5nc924cshgkxzchs5d`, Actions run https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/28330370613, `check:changed --base origin/release/2026.6.11 --head HEAD` passed with lanes `core, coreTests, extensions, extensionTests`.
